summary.source: Argan PPO Summary Plan Description, p.2
summary.snippet: Argan PPO carries a $312/mo employee share, $750 deductible, and a $4,000 individual out-of-pocket maximum. Prescription copays are tiered with a $15 generic copay.

preventive.snippet: All in-network preventive services — annual physical, prenatal, dental cleanings (2/yr), and well-child — are covered at 100% with no deductible.

ob.snippet: Prenatal visits are covered at 100% under preventive care; delivery and postpartum care apply to deductible and 80/20 coinsurance until OOP max is reached.

summary.source: Atlas HDHP+HSA Summary Plan Description, p.2
summary.snippet: Atlas HDHP carries a $168/mo employee share, $3,200 deductible, $6,500 OOP max. Employer contributes $1,200/yr to your HSA. Prescriptions apply to deductible until met.

preventive.snippet: Preventive services are covered at 100% before the deductible per ACA rules. This includes annual physical, prenatal visits, and dental cleanings (2/yr).

ob.snippet: Maternity-related services beyond preventive prenatal apply fully to the deductible. Delivery alone typically exceeds the deductible; OOP max protects after that.

rough-year.source: Argan PPO + Atlas HDHP comparison brief, p.4
rough-year.snippet: Under a rough-year scenario including one ER visit and weekly therapy, Atlas HDHP exposure exceeds the PPO until OOP max is reached in month 9 or earlier.

baby-march.source: Argan PPO SPD, p.14 / Atlas HDHP SPD, p.13
baby-march.snippet: An earlier delivery month front-loads cost: PPO copays apply per visit, HDHP costs apply to deductible until met, then 100% covered to OOP max.
